rag_rules: Latched expressions must be used only in component implementations, not in component types
Binary 'and' expressions require both operands to be of type bool
Mismatched input 'and' expecting '(' indicates syntax error in AGREE contract
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must use valid types: int, real, bool for constants and equations
Guarantees in component types should reference visible inputs and outputs only
Helper declarations and expressions must resolve to valid types without <error>
AGREE syntax requires proper use of logical operators and parentheses
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence patterns
Branching logic in AGREE uses nested if-then-else expressions
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths
anti_patterns: Avoid using latched expressions in component type scopes
Do not mix incompatible types in binary logical expressions
Do not reference unresolved identifiers in guarantee expressions
